content: DOMPurify is the recommended sanitizer for dangerouslySetInnerHTML; must configure to strip SVG/MathML if not needed, strip event-handler attrs (onerror, onload) and javascript: URLs. Mutation XSS (mXSS) bypasses exist where sanitized markup gets reparsed by the browser differently than the sanitizer saw it (SVG CDATA reparsing, SVG animate href=javascript:). Keep DOMPurify updated; combine with CSP as defense in depth.
